name: mxcheck
title: mxcheck

commands.name: mxcheck

arguments.description: Check if the service is on blacklists
arguments.raw: -b, --blacklist              Check if the service is on blacklists

arguments.description: The DKIM selector. If set a DKIM check is performed on the provided service domain
arguments.raw: -S, --dkim-selector string   The DKIM selector. If set a DKIM check is performed on the provided service domain

arguments.description: The dns server to be requested (default "8.8.8.8")
arguments.raw: -d, --dnsserver string       The dns server to be requested (default "8.8.8.8")
-s, --service string         The service host to check

arguments.description: Check for new version of mxcheck
arguments.raw: -u, --updatecheck            Check for new version of mxcheck

arguments.description: Write tsv formated report to file
arguments.raw: -w, --write-tsv              Write tsv formated report to file

commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# mxcheck -h
 Usage of mxcheck:
 -b, --blacklist              Check if the service is on blacklists
 -p, --disable-port-scan      Disable SMTP port scan
 -S, --dkim-selector string   The DKIM selector. If set a DKIM check is performed on the provided service domain
 -d, --dnsserver string       The dns server to be requested (default "8.8.8.8")
 -f, --mailfrom string        Set the mailFrom address (default "info@foo.wtf")
 -t, --mailto string          Set the mailTo address (default "info@baz.wtf")
 -n, --no-prompt              Answer yes to all questions
 -s, --service string         The service host to check
 -g, --smuggle                Test for SMTPSmuggling vulnerability
 -u, --updatecheck            Check for new version of mxcheck
 -V, --verbose                Show timestamps in output
 -v, --version                Version and license
 -w, --write-tsv              Write tsv formated report to file

binary_metadata.file_type: ELF 64-bit LSB executable, x86-64, version 1 (SYSV), dynamically linked, interpreter /lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2, BuildID[sha1]=21cf1eb03f79e46f96479e7696d5f054d81e6eb3, for GNU/Linux 3.2.0, stripped

apt_metadata.description:
Info and security scanner for e-mail servers
mxcheck is an info scanner for e-mail servers, checking:
.
- DNS records: A, MX, PTR, SPF, MTA-STS, DKIM, DMARC
- AS Number and AS Country
- The support of StartTLS and the certificate
- Open ports: 25, 465, 587
- If the service is listed by blacklists
- If it leaks information by server string and VRFY command
- If the server is an open relay

Indexing only — no automated invocation. The operator must manually inspect the repository before adding to a toolchain.
